prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: transparent mobile game character sprite. Primary request: original fantasy roadwarden heroine named Mira, compact readable in-game sprite, blue travel cloak, brass road lantern, short ashwood sling staff, determined expression, warm gold identity accents. Style/medium: stylized 3D-to-2D painterly game sprite with crisp silhouette and clean value grouping. Composition/framing: isometric three-quarter view, full body, centered, generous padding, no crop. Lighting/mood: warm lantern rim light against cool twilight shadows. Constraints: readable at 64px, chunky silhouette, no text, no logo, no copyrighted franchise resemblance.
